summary: Bumped urllib3>=2.7.0 in override-dependencies across all 9 pyproject.toml image variants and added CVE-2026-44431 reference comment. The centralized cve-constraints.txt was already updated in iteration 1.

validation.reason: Makefile requires container runtime (podman/docker) which is unavailable in this environment

observations: The centralized cve-constraints.txt already had urllib3>=2.7.0 from a prior CVE fix (CVE-2025-66418), so the lock file was already resolving to urllib3==2.7.0
Iteration 1 only fixed jupyter/rocm/pytorch; iteration 2 fixed the remaining 8 pyproject.toml files with stale urllib3>=2.6.0 floors
Lock file regeneration requires network access and a container runtime; the existing lock files are already correct
codeserver/ubi9-python-3.12/pyproject.toml has a historical comment mentioning urllib3>=2.6.0 but no actual urllib3 override in override-dependencies, so no change needed there
